description: Install dependencies and configure Tailwind CSS with a dark theme.
steps: Install chart.js and tailwindcss with bun
Configure Tailwind with dark mode, zinc palette, teal accent
Update app.html and +layout.svelte with dark background and base styles

description: Create mock transaction data and basic aggregation helpers.
steps: Create src/lib/data/transactions.ts with ~50 mock transactions across 3 months and 5 categories (dining, groceries, gas, entertainment, shopping)
Create src/lib/utils/aggregations.ts with helpers: spendingByCategory, monthlyTotals, totalSpent

description: Build the dashboard page with stat cards, a doughnut chart, and a transaction list.
steps: Create src/lib/components/StatCard.svelte — reusable card showing a label and dollar value
Create src/lib/components/CategoryChart.svelte — chart.js doughnut chart of spending by category
Create src/lib/components/TransactionList.svelte — simple list of recent transactions with date, merchant, amount
Wire everything into src/routes/+page.svelte with a header ('SpendLens'), stat cards row, chart, and transaction list in a single-column layout

description: Add vitest and write basic tests for the aggregation utils.
steps: Install vitest with bun and add test script to package.json
Write tests for spendingByCategory, monthlyTotals, and totalSpent
Ensure all tests pass with bun run test

description: Add a monthly spending trend line chart showing the past 3 months.
steps: Create src/lib/utils/aggregations.ts helper: spendingByMonth returning [{month, total}]
Create src/lib/components/TrendChart.svelte — chart.js Line chart with teal stroke, no fill, month labels on x-axis
Mount TrendChart in +page.svelte below the stat cards row
Write a vitest unit test for the spendingByMonth helper

description: Build a budget vs. actual comparison panel.
steps: Add budget constants to src/lib/data/budgets.ts — one budget per category (e.g. dining: 400, groceries: 300, etc.)
Add budgetComparison helper to aggregations.ts returning [{category, budget, actual, pct}]
Create src/lib/components/BudgetPanel.svelte — horizontal bar list with teal fill for under-budget, red fill for over-budget
Add BudgetPanel to +page.svelte in a two-column grid alongside CategoryChart
Write vitest tests for budgetComparison
